main.description: A discussion post within a task or community thread. Supports threaded replies via the standard ATProto reply mechanism. Lives in the com.creaton namespace so it doesn't appear in Bluesky feeds.

body.description: The discussion post text. Supports plain text or markdown.

reply.description: If present, this is a reply to another discussion post. root points to the top-level post, parent points to the direct parent.

topic.description: The topic this discussion belongs to. Links to an on-chain task, proposal, or an off-chain discussion root.

mentions.description: Mentions of other users in the body text.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this post was created.

replyRef.description: Reference to parent and root posts for threading.

topicRef.description: Reference to the topic this discussion belongs to.

uri.description: Identifier for the topic. Can be an at:// URI (for linking to an ATProto record), an on-chain reference (e.g., 'chain:1:0xabc...:42' for taskId 42), or a plain string identifier.

label.description: Optional human-readable label for the topic (e.g., task title).
